title: CAS Prediction Record (one per line in predictions.jsonl)
description: One JSON object per line. Per spec §4.1; linkage for evaluation and learning.

action_id.description: Unique id for this action (e.g. UUID); links to observations and learning

trace_id.description: Optional trace for multi-step or delegation chains

expected_observation.description: What the agent expects to observe after the action

falsifier.description: What observation would prove the expectation wrong

entry_id.description: Optional stable id (e.g. UUID) for this line; report can use entry_id_refs for audit under log compaction

policy_refs.description: Optional; ids of policies from STATE referenced when making this prediction (auditable behavior-change citation)

belief_refs.description: Optional; ids of beliefs from STATE referenced when making this prediction

tool_model_refs.description: Optional; tool names or ids from STATE tool_models referenced when making this prediction

citation_mode.description: manual = agent chose refs; auto_pending_queue = refs from STATE.pending_citations (audit requirement)

run_nonce.description: Optional. From STATE.run_nonce or run_nonce.txt; required for live-evidence runs so report excludes seeded data.
